title: Handle scorecard_info not-found as non-fatal in export migration procedure

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting fix for not-found fatal error. Replacing observer+tool-call-count existence probe with direct pcall-wrapped plexus_scorecard_info invocation and explicit 'not found' handling.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented robust existence probe: direct pcall-wrapped plexus_scorecard_info call with explicit 'not found' handling. This prevents runtime failure when target scorecard does not exist yet. Validated YAML parse and YAML loader test.
